lines.speaker: Alfonse the waiter
lines.text: Hey! You can't go through there! That's private property!

lines.speaker: Alfonse the waiter
lines.text: Welcome to the Shrimp and Parrot. Would you like to order, madam?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do you get your Karambwan from?

lines.speaker: Alfonse the waiter
lines.text: We buy directly off Lubufu, a local fisherman. He seems to have a monopoly over Karambwan sale.

lines.speaker: Alfonse the waiter
lines.text: He is usually working just to the south of the town.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How does he manage a monopoly?

lines.speaker: Alfonse the waiter
lines.text: Simple - nobody else knows how to catch Karambwan. It is a closely guarded secret.
